bgpraw:
Building configuration...

Current configuration:
!
frr version 10.4.1
frr defaults traditional
hostname MtFujiv2
log syslog informational
log facility local4
zebra nexthop-group keep 1
fpm address 127.0.0.1
no fpm use-next-hop-groups
no service integrated-vtysh-config
!
ip prefix-list LOCAL_VLAN_IPV4_PREFIX seq 5 permit 20.0.201.0/24
ip prefix-list PL_LoopbackV4 seq 5 permit 221.4.0.2/32
!
password zebra
enable password zebra
!
ip route 20.0.200.0/24 220.0.4.1 tag 1
ip route 221.1.0.0/26 20.0.201.1 tag 1
ip route 221.2.0.0/26 20.0.201.1 tag 1
ip route 221.0.0.1/32 20.0.201.1 tag 1
ip route 221.4.0.1/32 220.0.4.1 tag 1
!
vrf Vnet_55
 vni 10000
 ip nht resolve-via-default
 ipv6 nht resolve-via-default
exit-vrf
!
ip nht resolve-via-default
!
ipv6 nht resolve-via-default
!
end
